segments.text: Cat, my first attack on the bottle
Throw my three in the freezer so I can kill it
Careful with the bottle baby, you can still kill it
Cause ain't ours to say, the pain I was wet
You drink it down with the gals of the bottle
Head, take back the pack of drugs
You gon' get your soul saved now
So drink it till it's yours
Billy Dains just till he takes it down with the weak guys
Be a man to get a cat, a safe heart
